settings.highlight: ^The ground begins to shake violently, making it hard to stand.$
^You feel a sudden rush of power as you absorb (\d+) mana!$

^(?:You gesture|You intone a phrase of elemental power|You recite a series of mystical phrases|You trace a series of glowing runes|Your hands glow with power as you invoke|You trace a simple rune while intoning|You trace a sign while petitioning the spirits|You trace an intricate sign that contorts in the air).*$
Your recent adventures echo powerfully in your mind

(?-x:^A sense of peace and calm settles over the area\.|^As you savor the end of the shambling lurk, you feel you have satiated your desire for necromantic energy for the time being\.|^With the end of the shambling lurk, you feel your store of necromantic energy has reached its capacity\.|^The sense of peace and security passes away from the area\.)

(?-x:[\w]+ offers you (?:a|an|some) [\w\s\-\']+\. Click ACCEPT to accept the offer or DECLINE to decline it\. The offer will expire in 30 seconds\.|[\w]+ just gave you [\d]+ (?:coin|coins) which you quickly pocket\.)
^.* is stunned!$|^.*falls over.*$|^You come out of hiding\.$
(?-x:flickering in color and humming tones of enchantment!|The pulsating orb shrinks somewhat|It flares a sickening green and then goes dim)
The ground stops shaking as quickly as it started.

^.*(?:so called life|falls to the ground, a lifeless lump of flesh|falls slack against the floor|falls slack against the ground|falls to the floor, motionless|crumples to the ground motionless|falls to the ground dead|falls to the ground motionless|and dies|and lies still|goes still|going still|the stillness of death|then collapses in an unmoving heap|pale eyes fade as \w loses \w grip on life).*$

^\[Merchant\]|(churning|gas|dark)\scloud|warrior\snaturalist|\ssticky web|\svoid|You shiver slightly as an invisible rash covers your body!|A pale, flickering nimbus coalesces around (.*?), then vanishes in a brilliant flash!|^SEND.*
Running heedlessly through the icy terrain, you slip on a patch of ice but catch yourself before you truly lose your footing.

^.* throws (?:his|her) arms skyward!$|swirling black void|(?:Dozens of flaming meteors light the sky nearby!|Several flaming meteors light the nearby sky!|Several flaming rocks burst from the sky and smite the area!|A low roar of quickly parting air can be heard above!)

.*ruining your hiding place\.$|^You are no longer hidden\.$|^\s*You are (?:stunned|knocked to the ground).*|^You are unable to remain hidden!$|^You are visible again\.$|^You fade into sight\.$|^You fade into view.*|^You feel drained!$|^You have overextended yourself!$|^You feel yourself going into shock!$|^You feel the sting of a recent death slowly fade away, yet a lingering weakness remains.$

(?-x:^You take a deep breath, and look around with renewed vigor\. It is good to be alive, and an adventurer in this land\.|^With a sudden flash of insight, you realize you now understand more of what you have experienced.*$|^An old memory bubbles up from your past, and causes you to reflect a moment\. With a flash of insight, you realize you understand yourself a bit better than you did a moment ago\. The sudden feeling of self-knowledge is a pleasant one\.)
^A prismatic display of color tints the air around you and arcs away, heralding your discovery of a legendary treasure\!$
